details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories present (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/, reports/audit/).
governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ missing. memory_bank/ has 6 governance docs, .cursor/automations/ has README.md + 5 spec pairs — both OK.
no_deprecated_dirs: moltbot/ directory still exists at repo root with active Python modules (sentinel.py, orchestrator.py, board.py, memory_evolution.py, promotion_discipline.py).

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory contains active code referencing Moltbot. scripts/run_molt_workflow.py imports from moltbot package. scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py references Clawdbot removal stubs. alpaca_codebase_payload.txt contains 7 legacy references. (Excluded: reports/audit, docs, and reports/daily evidence files that document removal.)
